original_text: Large plot of land on the island of Maio with the total area of ​​63130, 14 m2. The plot is located on the beach close to the village of Morro, located only 5 kilometers away from Porto Inglês, the island’s capital city. the village has up to 1000 inhabitants and provides peace, comfort, privacy, and beautiful scenery. Two exceptional beaches ( Praia do Morro and Praia Baxona) are located close to the area. Due to the calm water and almost no waves, the beaches are ideal for swimming with small children. Maio Island can be reached by boat or plane. If you fly from the capital Praia by plane, you are on the island in 15 minutes. By boat, it takes 30 minutes. All basic services, including health care, are available on the island. * By submitting the form, you agree to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of sending you an offer. claude_text:
A coastal land plot of approximately 63,130 m² sits near the village of Morro on Maio Island, Cape Verde, roughly 5 kilometres from Porto Inglês, the island's capital. The plot borders beach frontage and lies within reach of two named beaches: Praia do Morro and Praia Baxona, both characterised by calm, low-wave water.

Maio is accessible from the capital Praia by a 15-minute flight or a 30-minute ferry crossing. The village of Morro has a population of around 1,000 and basic services, including healthcare, are available on the island.
gpt_text:
This plot of land is situated on the island of Maio in Cape Verde, near the village of Morro and just five kilometers from Porto Inglês, the island's capital. The total area of the land is 63,130 square meters, offering proximity to two notable beaches: Praia do Morro and Praia Baxona. These beaches are known for their calm waters, making them suitable for swimming with small children.

The land is located in a tranquil setting with a village population of around 1,000 inhabitants, providing a sense of peace and privacy. Maio Island is accessible by both boat and plane, with flights from the capital city Praia taking approximately 15 minutes and boat journeys around 30 minutes. Basic services, including healthcare, are available on the island.

The source mentions various price points for different plots, with this particular parcel listed at a negotiated price. The form submission for inquiry includes consent for personal data processing to receive offers.

original_text: We offer for sale a spacious and bright two-bedroom apartment, located in the Ilha de Lux complex, in Sal Rei, in a central and quiet area, a short distance from the beautiful Cabral Beach. The property, sold fully furnished, is spread over two floors: lower floor: open-plan living room with integrated kitchen, one bedroom, one bathroom and a spacious balcony, perfect for relaxing outdoors. Upper floor: second bedroom with en-suite bathroom and terrace, ideal as an additional outdoor leisure area. This property represents an excellent opportunity, both as a private residence and as an investment for rental income. For more information or to schedule a viewing without obligation, we are also available on Saturdays by appointment.
claude_text:
A two-bedroom duplex apartment within the Ilha de Lux complex in Sal Rei, Boa Vista, Cape Verde, positioned a short walk from Cabral Beach in a central, low-traffic area. The property is sold fully furnished.

The layout spans two floors. The lower level holds an open-plan living room with integrated kitchen, one bedroom, one bathroom, and a balcony. The upper level contains a second bedroom with en-suite bathroom and a private terrace.
gpt_text:
A spacious two-bedroom apartment is available for sale in the Ilha de Lux complex, located in Sal Rei, Cape Verde. The property is situated in a central and quiet area, just a short distance from Cabral Beach. The apartment is sold fully furnished and spans two floors.

The lower floor features an open-plan living room with an integrated kitchen, one bedroom, one bathroom, and a spacious balcony suitable for outdoor relaxation. The upper floor includes a second bedroom with an en-suite bathroom and a terrace, which serves as an additional outdoor leisure area.
